title: solanecio buchwaldii
intro: Solanecio buchwaldii, also known as Buchwald's solenostemon, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and treating respiratory infections, and has been used in herbal preparations to treat these conditions. In some regions, the leaves of the Solanecio buchwaldii plant are used to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
